channel.title: Coders on Auh
channel.description: Recent content in Coders on Auh

item.description: 1.子父代码执行流程 public class Son extends Father { private String name = "Son属性"; { System.out.println("Son，代码块"); } static { System.out.println("Son，静态 代码块"); } public Son() { System.out.println("Son 构造器 执行开始"); System.out.print("Son->childOveriddeBaseMethod--->"); childOveriddeBaseMethod(); System.out.print("Son->this.childOveriddeBaseMethod--->"); this.childOveriddeBaseMethod(); System.out.print("Son->super.childOveriddeBaseMethod--->"); super.childOveriddeBaseMethod(); System.out.print("Son->childCommonMethod()--->"); childCommonMethod(); System.out.println("Son 构造器 执行结束");
